arts.ttl: Birmingham City sent parting message as they sanction permanent transfer
arts.sum: The 22-year-old joined Cheltenham Town on loan for the first half of last season and then dropped into the non-league with Gateshead after making his final appearance in a Blues shirt under Chris Davies, as a substitute in the 4-0 EFL Trophy victory at Shrewsbury Town in October. Defender Josh Williams has bid Birmingham City farewell and thanked Blues for overseeing his development into a professional football, as he takes his leave and continues his career elsewhere.

arts.ttl: Chris Davies doubles down on Wrexham warning with Knighthead set to back Birmingham City
arts.sum: “I know there’s a good chance our owners will be there,” said Davies. “As much as I’m saying it’s just another game, it’s always positive that there’s interest in us and there’s interest in the fixture,” he said.

arts.ttl: Chris Davies has sent a clear transfer message over his Birmingham City players
arts.sum: Manager Chris Davies has presided over 25 wins from 34 matches this season and a number of his charges have caught the eye, but there doesn’t appear to be any danger of Blues losing anyone of note in the final fortnight of the transfer window. Long gone are the days where a Birmingham City manager ignores his phone in January through fear of having one of the club’s best players poached midway through the season.
